name: Piyush Kumar
title: Cybersecurity Specialist | Ethical Hacker | Security Researcher
bio: Passionate Cybersecurity Professional & Security Researcher | B.Tech Computer Science Student with hands-on experience in penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and security automation. Published patent holder with 3+ internships at leading tech companies. Discovered 15+ vulnerabilities across 8+ organizations through responsible disclosure. Proven track record of developing innovative security tools and identifying critical vulnerabilities. Ready to contribute to enterprise security teams with cutting-edge skills in Python automation, network security, and ethical hacking.

education.college: Rungta College of Engineering and Technology

experience.title: Cybersecurity and Ethical Hacking Intern
description: Gained hands-on experience with SQL Injection, vulnerability scanning, and ethical hacking techniques
Developed skills in cybersecurity, including practical knowledge of security best practices and vulnerabilities

experience.title: Cybersecurity Intern
description: Reported and recommended fixes for security issues

experience.title: Cyber Security Intern
description: Conducted web application vulnerability testing following OWASP Top 10 methodology
Performed network scanning and enumeration using Nmap and Wireshark
Analyzed phishing and malware threats to understand attack vectors
Documented findings and proposed mitigation techniques for common vulnerabilities
Participated in weekly technical reviews and knowledge-sharing sessions

patent.title: A Secure Password Management Device with Encryption, Multi-Factor Authentication, and Training
patent.description: Invented and developed an innovative password management solution, Cipher Lock, to enhance cybersecurity. The device generates and retrieves unique, site-specific, hashed passwords using SHA-256 encryption. It incorporates features such as user training modules.

findings.vulnerability: Anonymous Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange MitM Vulnerability
findings.impact: Data confidentiality and integrity compromise through man-in-the-middle attacks
findings.description: Identified anonymous DH key exchange allowing MitM attacks on encrypted FTP communications

findings.impact: Complete database access, table enumeration, and data extraction
findings.description: Discovered boolean-based blind SQL injection bypassing ModSecurity WAF using advanced tamper scripts
